title: Exercise Trainers and Group Fitness Instructors
description: Instruct or coach groups or individuals in exercise activities for the primary purpose of personal fitness. Demonstrate techniques and form, observe participants, and explain to them corrective measures necessary to improve their skills. Develop and implement individualized approaches to exercise.

tasks.text: Observe participants and inform them of corrective measures necessary for skill improvement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Offer alternatives during classes to accommodate different levels of fitness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor participants' progress and adapt programs as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan routines, choose appropriate music, and choose different movements for each set of muscles, depending on participants' capabilities and limitations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate individuals' abilities, needs, and physical conditions, and develop suitable training programs to meet any special requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct participants in maintaining exertion levels to maximize benefits from exercise routines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach and demonstrate use of gymnastic and training equipment, such as trampolines and weights.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain and enforce safety rules and regulations governing sports, recreational activities, and the use of exercise equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach proper breathing techniques used during physical exertion.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain fitness equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide students with information and resources regarding nutrition, weight control, and lifestyle issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer emergency first aid, wrap injuries, treat minor chronic disabilities, or refer injured persons to physicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment inventories, and select, store, or issue equipment as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise clients about proper clothing and shoes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct therapeutic, recreational, or athletic activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan physical education programs to promote development of participants' physical attributes and social skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach individual and team sports to participants through instruction and demonstration, using knowledge of sports techniques and of participants' physical capabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Promote health clubs through membership sales, and record member information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Organize and conduct competitions and tournaments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise participants in use of heat or ultraviolet treatments and hot baths.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
